profile: qwen36-27b AWQ decode, conc=1, v0.5.12 + patch-041 GEMV, --disable-cuda-graph, TP0 DECODE trace
verdict: GPU-compute-bound (85.8% util), NOT launch/dispatch-bound — explains why cuda-graph gives no speedup
roofline_note: ~13.5GB int4 weights / TP2 / ~640GB/s GDDR7; GEMV runs ~5x under this
conclusion: The patch-041 awq_gemv_bf16_kernel is the bottleneck (78% of decode GPU time) and runs ~5x under memory roofline. Optimizing this HIP kernel (occupancy/vectorization/split-k/tiling) is the single-user decode lever, NOT cuda-graph (no gaps to remove) and NOT DeltaNet (5ms). April-24's 24.1 tok/s predates patch-041 and likely used better-tuned rocBLAS dequant+GEMM.
